emails.subject: AEC
emails.body: Susan, I understand that Isabel Recindes, Drew Hill, Gerno Mendosa, Michelle Stevens, and Sherry Thomas may report directly to you. One of Enron Canada's key customers (AEC) has been attempting for the past six months to work with above on obtaining a detailed breakdown regarding an ongoing transaction between Enron North America and AEC (the "Harper/Chicago" transaction). Out of frustration with dealing with above individuals, Bill Hogue at AEC has now elevated the issue to me. Can you please assist Bill in getting the information he is requesting. Please advise. Thanks in advance, Rob Milnthorp President CEO Enron Canada

emails.subject: Re: AEC
emails.body: Re: AEC Rob, Thank you for bringing this to my attention. I met with my team members this morning and we have placed a call to AEC. I will apprise you of the outcome of the situation as soon as it is resolved. For future reference, Bryce Baxter is the manager of our Settlements group and reports directly to me. Please feel free to contact me or Bryce for any future concerns. Thanks, Susan Harrison 713-853-3960 Rob Milnthorp 06/28/2000 04:07 PM
